---
output: github_document
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# musicplyr


## Installation

You can install `musicplyr` from [GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("LangeTo/musicplyr")
```

## Acknowledgements
Thanks to the people form [IBSM](https://github.com/AG-Boerries) for inspiration, especially Andreas, Michael, Tom and Tonmoy.
